title: Eventus inbound support email main skill

resolver_contract.decision_rule: Load exactly one best item when confidence is clear, otherwise mark needs_review.

resolve_flow: Summarize the user problem as an ideal runbook item query.
Retrieve the closest runbook item by embedding search.
Load the parent skillbook for behavior and answer contract.
Draft the reply or mark needs_review if the item boundary is not enough.
writeback_flow: Prefer suggestion or draft over send.
Send only in clearly documented low-risk cases.
